arts.ttl: England vs Latvia: Reece James starts, Marcus Rashford keeps place
arts.sum: England defender Reece James has been handed his first international start in two years after he was included in Thomas Tuchel's team to face Latvia on Monday.

arts.ttl: England lineup to face Latvia confirmed as Thomas Tuchel makes four changes to starting XI
arts.sum: England head coach Thomas Tuchel makes four changes to his starting lineup for Monday's World Cup 2026 Qualifying clash with Latvia.

arts.ttl: England v Latvia: World Cup 2026 qualifier – live
arts.sum: Live updates from the 7.45pm GMT kick-off at Wembley Live scores | Fixtures | Email Daniel here I’m not massively surprised by the players missing out. Walker will not be a starter at the next tournament; Burn is a lovely story but are we really saying he’s good enough even though the competition is limited?; Jones is a good player, but are we really saying he’s good enough given the competition is stiff?; and Foden has played well for England so infrequently that it makes sense to give a different kind of player a chance. Tuchel makes four changes to the side that beat Albania on Friday night: out go Walker, Burn, Jones and Foden; in come James, Guéhi, Rogers and Bowen. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Morgan Rogers handed first England start against Latvia
arts.sum: Reece James, Marc Guehi and Jarrod Bowen were the other men to come into the side.
